esqlQuery.esql:
// Alert when monitored hosts have unavailable agent interfaces.
// This means the Zabbix server cannot reach the agent on the host.
FROM metrics-zabbix.host_status-*
| WHERE zabbix.host.active_available == "unavailable"
  AND zabbix.host.status == "enabled"
| STATS occurrences = COUNT(*) BY zabbix.host.name, zabbix.host.interface.ip
| WHERE occurrences >= 1
